description: Project documentation records the Curio Cards launch in May 2017. This date is used as the starting point in archive chronology.
impact_assessment: Provides the baseline date for historical ordering of subsequent Curio events.

description: Project documentation lists the publication timestamp for the 17b duplicate deployment. The event is retained as a distinct entry in collection records.
impact_assessment: Introduces a documented variant event reflected in card and contract references.

description: Christie's published lot records include a Curio Cards full-set sale context. Archive timelines use the published auction date as a dated institutional reference.
impact_assessment: Adds externally published institutional documentation to the event record.
